title: Warning Signs For The AI Boom, Anthropic Passes OpenAI, Robinhood’s AI Trading
summary: Alex Kantrowitz and Ranjan Roy discuss warning signs in the AI boom, including explosive token consumption costs, misalignment between AI spending and shipped products, and circular investment dynamics. Topics include Anthropic's valuation milestone, Robinhood's AI trading integration, and privacy concerns around AI data usage.
